expectations.text: Report file exists matching comparison naming convention *-compare-*-vs-*.md
Report contains a side-by-side comparison table with scores for both domains
expectations.evidence: Overall Comparison table: docs.anthropic.com 55.7/100 (F), platform.openai.com 50.0/100 (F), with AEO and GEO breakdowns.

expectations.text: Report focuses on AEO and GEO categories — no SEO Technical, SEO On-Page, or Structured Data scoring
expectations.evidence: Only AEO and GEO category results present. No SEO Technical, On-Page, or Structured Data sections scored.

expectations.text: Report contains data from both docs.anthropic.com AND platform.openai.com (not just one site)
expectations.evidence: Separate check tables for each site per category. Both crawled (4 pages each).

expectations.text: Report includes a top 3 fixes section for each site
expectations.evidence: 'Top 3 Fixes: docs.anthropic.com' and 'Top 3 Fixes: platform.openai.com' sections both present with specific check IDs.

expectations.text: Report identifies which site performs better per category with reasoning
expectations.evidence: Winner column in comparison table plus detailed Category Analysis sections explaining why each site leads or trails.
